mapper.select: SELECT notice_id, admin_id, category, title, content, image_url, view_count, is_top, created_at FROM NOTICE WHERE category = 'NOTICE' AND is_top = 'Y' ORDER BY notice_id DESC
SELECT notice_id, admin_id, category, title, content, image_url, view_count, is_top, created_at FROM NOTICE WHERE category = 'NOTICE' AND is_top = 'N' ORDER BY notice_id DESC
SELECT notice_id, admin_id, category, title, content, image_url, view_count, is_top, created_at FROM NOTICE WHERE category = 'EVENT' AND is_top = 'Y' ORDER BY notice_id DESC
SELECT notice_id, admin_id, category, title, content, image_url, view_count, is_top, created_at FROM NOTICE WHERE category = 'EVENT' AND is_top = 'N' ORDER BY notice_id DESC
